sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Kalsuan simin Honpa ka mai ah pai hi:
A itna khut tawh hong makaih a
Husan simin Topa
nangmah kong bia hi.
Nang mah tawh tonkhawm leng nuam ka sa.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Kalsuan simin a
hong pi ding ka thei a
A sangzaw ah hong paipih tawntung hi.
Khatvei ni ciang lamtawpna ka
tungding a,
Kalsuan simin inn ka nai semsem hi.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Ka upna tha khat veivei a hong kiam
ciang
Ka etna khempeuh lungkiatna hi.
Kihei kikin kei hong gumpa ka et ciang
Hong ompih manin
ka thahat hi.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Bangbang hong piang taleh Pasian ka muang hi.
Nuntakna ama sungah om
hi.
Amah lampi a hong honsak theipa hi.
Khapsa gam nuam ah hong tun ding hi.
